threshold_expression: ex_convulsions == true OR ex_not_able_to_drink_or_feed == true OR ex_vomits_everything == true OR ex_unusually_sleepy_or_unconscious == true
human_label: Any general danger sign is present
source_quote: Check for general danger signs: convulsions, not able to drink or feed, vomits everything, unusually sleepy or unconscious

threshold_expression: (demo_age_months >= 2 AND demo_age_months < 12 AND v_respiratory_rate_per_min >= 50) OR (demo_age_months >= 12 AND demo_age_months <= 59 AND v_respiratory_rate_per_min >= 40)
human_label: Child has fast breathing for age
source_quote: Fast breathing: 50 or more breaths per minute for child 2 months up to 12 months; 40 or more breaths per minute for child 12 months up to 5 years

threshold_expression: q_cough == true AND p_fast_breathing == true AND ex_chest_indrawing == false
human_label: Cough with fast breathing (pneumonia) without chest indrawing
source_quote: If the child has cough with fast breathing, classify as PNEUMONIA
If chest indrawing: refer urgently to hospital

threshold_expression: q_cough == true AND p_fast_breathing == false AND ex_chest_indrawing == false
human_label: Cough or cold with no fast breathing (no pneumonia)
source_quote: If no fast breathing and no chest indrawing: cough or cold, no pneumonia
If RDT is positive, classify as MALARIA

human_label: Fever with negative RDT (fever, no malaria)
source_quote: If RDT is negative, classify as FEVER, NO MALARIA
If fever for 7 days or more, refer to hospital
If diarrhoea for 14 days or more, refer

human_label: Severe acute malnutrition (MUAC < 115 mm or oedema of both feet)
source_quote: Red on MUAC tape or oedema of both feet: severe acute malnutrition, refer urgently

threshold_expression: v_muac_mm >= 115 AND v_muac_mm < 125 AND ex_oedema_both_feet == false
source_quote: Yellow on MUAC tape: moderate acute malnutrition
